title: Likelihood Function Construction in State-Space Models
description: A visual guide showing the process of building the likelihood function from a state-space model's latent states and observed data, highlighting the recursive filtering and prediction steps.
relationships: Initial state provides the prior for the first prediction step
State transition model propagates the state forward to the prediction step
Prediction step combines with observation model to form the filtering step
One-step prediction likelihood is derived from the prediction step and observation model
Overall likelihood is the product of all one-step prediction likelihoods across time
